title: pilosella euchaetia subsp. tscherningii
intro: Pilosella euchaetia subsp. tscherningii is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, Asteraceae. This plant, commonly known as a type of hawkweed, is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Pilosella euchaetia subsp. tscherningii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, or topical creams that can be used to support overall health and well-being.
